description:
Add JUnit unit tests to the NotepadApp Android project to provide test coverage for the NoteValidator, NoteFormatter, and Note classes. Create the following test files in app/src/test/java/com/example/notepad/, ensuring each file contains at least 3 test methods:

- NoteValidatorTest.kt: Test isValidTitle, isValidContent, isNoteComplete, isValidId, and isValidColor with both valid and invalid inputs.
- NoteFormatterTest.kt: Test formatTitle, formatPreview, formatDate, and formatWordCount.
- NoteTest.kt: Test the Note data class helper methods wordCount and charCount.
